title: 📱 Social Media
lead: When a customer registers a complaint or request on social media (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X), the service follows a specific flow.

step1.title: Monitoring
step1.text: The Social Media team monitors all customer mentions, comments, and private messages daily.

step2.title: Ticket Creation
step2.text: When identifying a request, the team creates a ticket in Salesforce with all relevant case information.

step3.title: Routing
step3.text: The ticket is routed to SAC or the Store, depending on the type of request.

step4.title: Customer Response
step4.text: After handling, SAC records the response in Salesforce, ensuring that the Social Media team can respond to the customer on the same channel.

directions.title: When to route to each area?

sac.title: Routed to SAC
sac.text: When it involves analysis, handling, customer response, or need for deeper contact.

loja.title: Routed to Store
loja.text: When direct involvement of the manager is needed (e.g.: specific unit issues, physical occurrences, questions about local products).

highlight.title: Result
highlight.text: This flow ensures speed and standardization in social media service.

q1.text: Question: Who is responsible for responding to the customer on social media after SAC handles the case?
q1.feedback: Correct! The Social Media team responds to the customer on the same channel, using the information recorded by SAC in Salesforce.
